opening_thought: Green air. Petals underfoot. The bedroom feels very far away.

thoughts.lesson_2_garden: Growth. Things that were buried push toward light whether you watch or not.
thoughts.garden_arbor_musings: Vines remember the shape of every trellis they ever climbed.
thoughts.garden_clue_musings: Carved into the bed frame: GROWTH. The word wants to be used.

garden_clue_found.title: Garden Marker
garden_clue_found.body: A wooden marker in the flower bed reads: GROWTH.

lesson_2_garden.title: Lesson — Growth
lesson_2_garden.body: The garden chest opened to GROWTH. Something in the bedroom will listen now.

garden_arbor.title: Arbor
garden_arbor.body: Wooden arches tangled with ivy. A place to pause before choosing a path.

garden_clue.title: Flower Bed
garden_clue.body: Soil freshly turned. A wooden marker reads: GROWTH.

garden_chest.title: Garden Chest
garden_chest.body: A small chest at the path's end. Letter lock. It wants a word, not a number.

ending.title: Garden
ending.body: The path ends here for now.
